strengths: Excellent completion time of 34 seconds demonstrates good speed and efficiency
Systematic progression through all cutting phases without penalties
Clean execution with all 6 green ropes successfully cut
Good instrument control maintaining steady cutting motion
weaknesses: Inconsistent traction positioning causing some awkward cutting angles
Occasional hesitation between rope transitions affecting flow
Camera positioning could be more centered on the cutting target

drills.name: Traction-angle practice
drills.description: 10 repetitions of repositioning the Maryland to improve scissor entry angle before each cut
drills.targets_weakness: Inconsistent traction positioning causing awkward cutting angles

drills.name: Circle tracking quarter-cuts
drills.description: Cut the circle in four controlled quadrants while maintaining optimal traction throughout

drills.name: Camera centering reset
drills.description: 3 minutes of centering and re-centering the work target before the first move
drills.targets_weakness: Camera positioning could be more centered on cutting target

progression_note: Strong intermediate performance with excellent speed. Focus on refining traction mechanics and maintaining consistent cutting angles to achieve more fluid execution and approach advanced benchmarks.
